source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.why_hot: Reflects competition among provinces to attract elderly population amid aging crisis, sparking discussion on pension policies.
topics.share_angle: Explain the policy incentives and demographic challenges behind this trend.

topics.official_english: Expert: BYD is not just an automaker
topics.why_hot: Highlights BYD's transformation into a tech and energy company, challenging traditional perceptions.
topics.share_angle: Discuss BYD's diversification into batteries, semiconductors, and energy storage.

topics.chinese_topic: 未来5年消费“路线图”来了
topics.official_english: China unveils consumption roadmap for next five years
topics.why_hot: Government plan to boost domestic consumption, affecting economic outlook and consumer behavior.
topics.share_angle: Break down key targets and sectors (e.g., digital, green consumption).

topics.chinese_topic: 世界杯半决赛：法国vs西班牙
topics.official_english: World Cup semifinal: France vs Spain
topics.why_hot: Major sports event drawing global attention; Chinese fans discuss match predictions.
topics.share_angle: Preview the match, key players, and historical rivalry.

topics.chinese_topic: AI生成图片被评摄影一等奖 官方通报
topics.official_english: AI-generated image wins photography award; official investigation launched
topics.why_hot: Raises ethical questions about AI in art and competition rules.
topics.share_angle: Discuss the controversy and implications for creative industries.

topics.official_english: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng becomes new AI billionaire
topics.why_hot: Reflects China's AI boom and wealth creation in tech startups.
topics.share_angle: Profile Liang Wenfeng and DeepSeek's rise in AI.

topics.chinese_topic: 美股开盘：AI硬件股上涨 IBM跌22%
topics.official_english: US stocks open: AI hardware stocks rise, IBM drops 22%
topics.why_hot: Significant market movements affecting global tech investors.
topics.share_angle: Analyze reasons behind IBM's plunge and AI hardware rally.

topics.chinese_topic: 排污口成戏水地 志愿者：这是冲马桶水
topics.official_english: Drainage outlet becomes swimming spot; volunteer says it's toilet flush water
topics.why_hot: Exposes environmental pollution and public health risks, sparking outrage.
topics.share_angle: Highlight water pollution issues and volunteer efforts.
